name: Dessert Egg Rolls
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds tart green apples, peeled, cored, sliced thin
1/2 cup sugar plus extra for sprinkling
recipeInstructions:
1. Place apples, apple juice, sugar, jam, zest, nutmeg, and apple pie spice in a large heavy skillet.
2. Cook over medium-high heat, covered, until apples are tender about 10-15 minutes. Stir in walnuts and taste and adjust seasonings.
3. Place several tablespoons of filling at an angle in the center of an egg roll wrapper.
4. Roll up like an envelope, lightly moistening edges with water to seal.
5. Place seam-side down on a buttered baking sheet. Repeat until all filling is used.
6. Brush tops with melted butter and sprinkle with sugar.
7. Place under hot broiler until golden about 3-5 minutes. To serve: place caramel sauce into individual dessert plates and place egg rolls on top.
